title: acer pectinatum subsp. laxiflorum
intro: Acer pectinatum subsp. laxiflorum, commonly known as the pendulous maple or Korean maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species native to East Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Acer pectinatum subsp. laxiflorum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
